Container.Name: broccoli_stealth-browser-mcp
Container.Overview: Stealth browser MCP server for AI agents — bypasses Cloudflare, antibot systems, and social media blocks using nodriver + Chrome DevTools Protocol + FastMCP. Exposes a Streamable HTTP MCP endpoint at /mcp on port 8000. Provides 97 tools across 11 sections: browser management, element interaction, element extraction, network interception, CDP function execution, and more. Set STEALTH_BROWSER_MCP_AUTH_TOKEN to enable bearer token auth for the HTTP endpoint.

Config.Name: MCP HTTP Port
Config.Description: Container Port: 8000 — MCP Streamable HTTP endpoint at /mcp. Point your MCP client to http://<unraid-ip>:8000/mcp

Config.Name: Auth Token
Config.Description: Optional auth token for HTTP transport. When set, HTTP clients must send this value as a bearer token in the Authorization header. Strongly recommended when the port is accessible on your network. Example: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Browser Idle Timeout
Config.Description: Seconds of inactivity before an unused browser instance is auto-closed. Set to 0 to disable idle reaping globally.

Config.Name: Idle Reaper Interval
Config.Description: Background reaper check interval in seconds.

Config.Name: Orphan Profile Max Age
Config.Description: Startup cleanup threshold in seconds for stale uc_* temp browser profiles. Set to 0 to disable startup sweep.

Config.Name: Debug Logging
Config.Description: Set to 1 to enable verbose debug logging to stderr.
